markdownRemark.html:
Project Description

Worked with US-based 2K Games on feature development and maintenance of an internal admin web app used by game developers, built on a micro-frontend architecture. Also developed new features for an AccelByte core product.

What I did

  • Built and maintained features across the micro-frontend admin app
  • Coordinated with QA and Product teams across time zones for high-quality releases
  • Developed new features for an AccelByte core product

frontmatter.title: Technodrome
frontmatter.description: Feature development on an internal admin web app used by game developers at 2K Games, built on a micro-frontend architecture.
